title: Mr. Monk and the Actor
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Method actor David Ruskin is cast to play Monk in a movie and complicates the investigation.

persons.name: Jack Leverett
persons.notes: Auto dealer who killed his blackmailer

deaths.notes: Leverett shoved Cullman into the staircase when he discovered her hidden camera during a struggle.

title: Mr. Monk and the Garbage Strike
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A citywide garbage strike sends Monk's OCD into overdrive while he investigates a union boss's apparent suicide.

persons.name: Jimmy Cusack
persons.notes: Sanitation union boss, killed to look like a suicide

persons.name: Ron Neely
persons.notes: Union official skimming the pension fund

deaths.notes: Neely staged Cusack's death as a suicide to prevent him from exposing the pension fund theft.

title: Mr. Monk and the Big Game
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Julie's basketball coach is murdered; the killer used electrocution via a rigged hair dryer.

persons.name: Aaron Hayden
persons.notes: Killed the coach to prevent DNA evidence from linking him to a cold-case murder

deaths.notes: Aaron sabotaged a hair dryer and flooded the locker room to electrocute Lynn before she could give a DNA sample that would link him to a cold-case murder.

title: Mr. Monk Can't See a Thing
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk is temporarily blinded by acid thrown by the killer and must solve the case without his sight.

persons.name: Stefanie Preston
persons.notes: Mistress of Peter Breen, killed to cover up the affair

persons.name: Eddie Murdoch
persons.notes: Hired killer; also attacked Monk with acid

persons.name: Peter Breen
persons.notes: Construction foreman who paid Murdoch to kill his mistress

deaths.notes: Murdoch strangled Stefanie and set her house on fire on behalf of Peter Breen, who wanted rid of his mistress.

title: Mr. Monk, Private Eye
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk and Natalie open a private detective agency; their first client's fender bender leads to a murder investigation.

persons.name: Anna Pollard
persons.notes: Dr. Bennett's girlfriend, killed on his boat

persons.name: Dr. Jay Bennett
persons.notes: Killed his girlfriend when she tried to leave him

deaths.notes: Bennett struck Anna with a champagne bottle and drowned her in a locked metal box on his boat when she tried to leave him.

title: Mr. Monk and the Class Reunion
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: At his 25th college reunion, Monk investigates the murder of a retired nurse and tries to prevent his classmate's death.

persons.name: Kyle
persons.notes: Killed the nurse and planned to kill his wife Dianne for insurance money

deaths.notes: Kyle shoved the nurse down the stairs to prevent her from interfering with his plan to murder his wife for the insurance payout.

title: Mr. Monk Gets a New Shrink
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Dr. Kroger's cleaning lady is stabbed in his office; Kroger retires, sending Monk into a tailspin.

persons.name: Teresa
persons.notes: Dr. Kroger's cleaning lady; accidentally found stashed heroin

persons.name: Merrigan
persons.notes: Therapist who hid heroin in office figurines

deaths.notes: Merrigan stabbed Teresa with a letter opener after she accidentally broke a figurine containing his stashed heroin.

title: Mr. Monk Goes to a Rock Concert
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A roadie dies of an apparent overdose at a music festival; Monk discovers it was murder to cover stolen song credit.

persons.name: Stork
persons.notes: Roadie and songwriter; killed over stolen song credit

persons.name: Kris Kedder
persons.notes: Rock star who stole Stork's song and had him killed

deaths.notes: Kedder impersonated Stork at an acupuncturist, then arranged a fake overdose to silence the roadie who discovered Kedder had stolen full credit for his song.

title: Mr. Monk Meets His Dad
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk reconnects with his estranged trucker father and they together uncover a murder at a trucking company.

persons.name: Kenneth Woods
persons.notes: Trucking company co-owner; killed by his partner

persons.name: Ben Glazer
persons.notes: Trucking company partner committing financial fraud

deaths.notes: Glazer let Kenneth's tie get caught in a running semi engine, then kicked his feet out to ensure death, preventing exposure of his financial fraud.

title: Mr. Monk and the Leper
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A millionaire supposedly suffering from leprosy hires Monk; the real Derek Bronson was killed years ago by his wife.

persons.name: Derek Bronson
persons.notes: Millionaire CEO killed by his wife seven years prior

persons.name: Mandy Bronson
persons.notes: Killed her husband and used an impersonator to maintain control of his estate

deaths.notes: Mandy killed her husband seven years before the episode and used a lookalike impersonator to maintain control of the estate before Derek could be declared legally dead.

title: Mr. Monk Makes a Friend
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk befriends a man who turns out to be using him to recover evidence linking him to a murder.

persons.name: Gail Segalis
persons.notes: Former police dispatcher who discovered Hal's smuggling

persons.name: Hal Tucker
persons.notes: Antiquities smuggler who befriended Monk to retrieve incriminating evidence

deaths.notes: Hal killed Gail when she discovered his antiquities smuggling operation; he befriended Monk to retrieve a photo of the two together that Gail had mailed to Monk.

title: Mr. Monk Is at Your Service
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk goes undercover as a butler to investigate the suspicious deaths of a wealthy couple and a subsequent blackmail murder.

persons.name: Edward Stilson
persons.notes: Butler who was blackmailing Paul Buchanan

persons.name: Paul Buchanan
persons.notes: Killed his step-mother for the inheritance, then killed the blackmailer

deaths.notes: Paul killed his parents' butler after the butler discovered and began blackmailing him over engineering his step-mother's death for the inheritance.

title: Mr. Monk Is on the Air
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Radio DJ Max Hudson had a seemingly airtight alibi; he trained a dog to trigger a gas leak using a phrase in his broadcast.

persons.name: Jeanette Hudson
persons.notes: Wife of radio DJ Max Hudson, killed by gas asphyxiation

persons.name: Max Hudson
persons.notes: Radio DJ who trained a dog to trigger the gas while he was on air as alibi

deaths.notes: Max trained a neighbor's dog to turn on the gas in the bedroom whenever the dog heard a specific phrase during Max's live radio broadcast, giving him a perfect on-air alibi.

title: Mr. Monk Visits a Farm
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Disher inherits his uncle's farm and suspects foul play in the old man's apparent suicide.

persons.name: Harvey Disher
persons.notes: Randy Disher's uncle; farmer killed to look like a suicide

persons.name: Jimmy Belmont
persons.notes: Neighbor running illegal marijuana crops; killed Harvey to prevent exposure

deaths.notes: Belmont staged Harvey's death as a self-inflicted rifle shot to prevent Harvey from turning him in for running illegal marijuana crops.

title: Mr. Monk and the Really, Really Dead Guy
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A street musician is killed six ways simultaneously to distract police while a doctor covers up the real murder of his date.

persons.name: Jean Garnett
persons.notes: Pharmaceutical employee killed by Dr. Leven; the central murder

persons.name: Cyrus Canning
persons.notes: Street musician killed six ways as a distraction

persons.name: Dr. Leven
persons.notes: Doctor who killed his date then engineered a fake serial killer panic as a distraction

deaths.notes: Dr. Leven killed Jean and then staged Cyrus Canning's death as a bizarre six-way murder to distract police for 36 hours until stomach content evidence linking him to Jean would degrade.
Random victim killed in six simultaneous ways to manufacture a false serial killer narrative as a distraction.

title: Mr. Monk Goes to the Hospital
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk is hospitalized for a nosebleed and witnesses a murder; the killer used a room connection to establish a false alibi.

persons.name: Dr. Graydon Whitcomb
persons.notes: Doctor beaten to death to prevent malpractice testimony

persons.name: Dr. Davis Scott
persons.notes: Doctor who killed his colleague to prevent malpractice testimony against him

deaths.notes: Scott smuggled his heart monitor into another patient's room via a supply closet to fake an alibi, then beat Dr. Whitcomb to death with an oxygen tank to prevent him testifying in a malpractice lawsuit.

title: Mr. Monk and His Biggest Fan
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk's obsessive fan Marci Maven is accused of her neighbor's death; the killer used a mold of a dead dog's teeth as a weapon.

persons.name: Debbie Ringel
persons.notes: Neighbor killed by her husband using a dog-teeth mold weapon

persons.name: John Ringel
persons.notes: Used a mold of a dog's teeth to frame the dog for his wife's murder

deaths.notes: Ringel knocked his wife out with a brick then used garden shears fitted with a mold of his neighbor's dog's teeth to make the death look like a mauling; the dog had already died, ruining the frame-up.

title: Mr. Monk and the Rapper
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A car bomb kills the wrong rapper because the killer forgot to account for Daylight Saving Time.

persons.name: Xtra Large
persons.notes: Rapper killed by a misdirected car bomb

persons.name: Denny Hodges
persons.notes: Record label executive who planted the car bomb; killed the wrong person

deaths.notes: Hodges planted a car bomb targeting his business partner but forgot to account for Daylight Saving Time; the bomb killed rapper Xtra Large instead.

title: Mr. Monk and the Naked Man
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk's prejudice against nudists clouds his investigation; the real killer is the victim's roommate who wanted to profit from a tycoon's death.

persons.name: Vickie Deline
persons.notes: Murdered while trying to warn a tycoon of an aneurysm

persons.name: Arlene Boras
persons.notes: Day trader who killed her roommate to prevent a tycoon from being warned about his fatal aneurysm

deaths.notes: Arlene stabbed Vickie to prevent her from warning tycoon Peter Magneri about his aortic aneurysm; Arlene was short-selling his stock and needed him to die under stress.

title: Mr. Monk and the Bad Girlfriend
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk must prove to Stottlemeyer that his girlfriend Linda Fusco murdered her real estate partner; she created a fake alibi using a mobile bedroom in a truck.

persons.name: Sean Corcoran
persons.notes: Real estate agent shot by his partner Linda

persons.name: Linda Fusco
persons.notes: Stottlemeyer's girlfriend; killed her business partner for financial reasons

deaths.notes: Linda shot her real estate partner at an open house and used a replica of her bedroom in a truck to create a false alibi on a webcam with Stottlemeyer.

title: Mr. Monk and the Birds and the Bees
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A sports agent stages a burglary to cover killing his wife, then shoots the burglar as a supposed self-defense witness.

persons.name: Mrs. Sherman
persons.notes: Wife of sports agent Robert Sherman, shot during a staged burglary

persons.name: Dewey Jordan
persons.notes: Burglar accomplice shot by Sherman to stage a self-defense scenario

persons.name: Robert Sherman
persons.notes: Sports agent who staged a burglary to kill his wife and eliminate the witness

deaths.notes: Sherman arranged a fake burglary with Dewey Jordan, then shot both Dewey and his wife when she came downstairs, framing the scenario as a home invasion.

title: Mr. Monk and the Buried Treasure
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk helps Dr. Kroger's son follow a treasure map that leads to stolen bank robbery loot and a murder.

persons.name: Jack Connolly's brother
persons.notes: Accomplice beaten during bank robbery, killed to eliminate a witness

persons.name: Happy Jack Connolly
persons.notes: Bank robber who pistol-whipped his own brother during the heist

deaths.notes: Happy Jack pistol-whipped his brother during the bank robbery to eliminate a witness to the crime and keep the full loot for himself.

title: Mr. Monk and the Daredevil
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A daredevil's burned body is found; the killer tried to pass off a drugged Harold Krenshaw as the daredevil to fake an inheritance death.

persons.name: Victor Granja
persons.notes: The real Frisco Fly daredevil; died in a car crash

persons.name: Joey
persons.notes: Burned the crash car to cover Victor's death and set up Harold Krenshaw to die as the 'daredevil' for inheritance money

deaths.notes: Joey burned Victor Granja's crash site to hide his identity, then drugged Harold Krenshaw and dressed him as the daredevil to die in a staged stunt and claim the inheritance.

title: Mr. Monk and the Wrong Man
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk believes he wrongly convicted an innocent man; twist reveals the convict was actually guilty but had a secret accomplice.

persons.name: John Davis
persons.notes: Man tortured and murdered in his home 14 years prior

persons.name: Pauly Flores
persons.notes: Max Barton's accomplice in the original murders; killed by Max to prevent exposure

persons.name: Max Barton
persons.notes: Originally convicted of the Davis murders; the real killer who eliminated his accomplice after release

deaths.notes: Max and Pauly Flores committed the Davis murders 14 years prior; DNA cleared Max but actually belonged to Pauly. After release, Max killed Pauly to prevent exposure.

title: Mr. Monk Is Up All Night
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk witnesses what he thinks is a murder; it was a con trick, but the mark then kills the fake victim for real.

persons.name: Lee
persons.notes: Con artist who faked his death in a scam; later killed for real by his mark

persons.name: Jacob Posner
persons.notes: Coin dealer who killed Lee after realizing he'd been conned

deaths.notes: Lee faked his death as part of a con on coin dealer Posner; when Posner realized he'd been scammed, he tracked Lee down at a train station and shot him for real.

title: Mr. Monk and the Man Who Shot Santa Claus
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk shoots a man in a Santa suit in self-defense and is vilified; the 'Santa' was orchestrating a diamond heist.

persons.name: Alice Dubois
persons.notes: Bystander killed by the fake Santa after donating to his collection

persons.name: Michael Kenworthy
persons.notes: Retired parole officer dressed as Santa; organized a diamond heist and killed a witness

deaths.notes: Kenworthy, dressed as Santa to create a traffic distraction for a diamond heist, chased down and beat Alice Dubois to death with his bell to silence her as a witness.

title: Mr. Monk Joins a Cult
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk goes undercover in a cult to investigate a young woman's murder; the cult was framed by the real killer.

persons.name: Amanda Clark
persons.notes: Young woman killed by a client and pinned on a cult

persons.name: Tom Donovan
persons.notes: Killed Amanda when a traffic camera captured them together and framed the cult

deaths.notes: Donovan killed Amanda and pinned it on the Siblings of the Sun cult after a red-light camera photo captured the two of them together, knowing she had ties to the cult.

title: Mr. Monk Goes to the Bank
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Bank employees staged their own robbery; the branch manager was killed by a co-conspirator after he spent too conspicuously.

persons.name: Peter Crawley
persons.notes: Bank branch manager killed by co-conspirators after he spent his share too conspicuously

persons.name: Madge
persons.notes: Bank employee and ringleader of the inside job robbery

deaths.notes: Peter Crawley was killed by his fellow conspirators after he bought an expensive car with stolen money, risking exposing their coordinated bank robbery.

title: Mr. Monk and the Three Julies
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: A man kills his wife and a witness; police fear a serial killer targeting women named Julie Teeger, including Natalie's daughter.

persons.name: Julie Teeger (Disher's wife)
persons.notes: George Teeger's wife; killed after she confronted him about his affair

persons.name: Julie Teeger (graduate student)
persons.notes: Graduate student who accidentally received a parcel proving George's affair

persons.name: George Teeger
persons.notes: Killed his wife and a witness to cover up his extramarital affair

deaths.notes: George stabbed his wife after she confronted him about proof of his affair delivered to the wrong address.

title: Mr. Monk Paints His Masterpiece
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk takes up painting; a Russian art dealer buys all his paintings because they were made on Treasury-grade paper useful for counterfeiting.

persons.name: Bennie Wentworth
persons.notes: Junkyard owner killed for Treasury-grade canvas paper

persons.name: Petya Lovak
persons.notes: Fake art dealer seeking Treasury-grade paper from Monk's canvases for counterfeiting

deaths.notes: Lovak killed junkyard owner Bennie Wentworth to acquire his stock of Treasury-grade canvas paper needed for counterfeiting money.

title: Mr. Monk Is on the Run (Part 1)
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk kills the six-fingered man who murdered Trudy; corrupt Sheriff Rollins frames him by swapping gun barrels.

persons.name: Frank Nunn
persons.notes: The six-fingered man who murdered Trudy Monk; killed by Sheriff Rollins

persons.name: Sheriff John Rollins
persons.notes: Corrupt sheriff on Dale the Whale's payroll; framed Monk for Nunn's murder

deaths.notes: Rollins shot Frank Nunn from hiding and switched gun barrels to frame Monk, preventing Nunn from revealing who hired him to kill Trudy Monk.

title: Mr. Monk Is on the Run (Part 2)
creator: Andy Breckman
notes: Monk fakes his death with Stottlemeyer's help to investigate from hiding; Sheriff Rollins was working for Dale the Whale to assassinate the governor.

persons.name: The Governor
persons.notes: Assassination target; bomb planted in his car by Rollins on Dale the Whale's orders

persons.name: Sheriff John Rollins
persons.notes: Corrupt sheriff attempting a gubernatorial assassination on behalf of Dale the Whale

deaths.notes: Rollins planted a bomb in the governor's car at Dale the Whale's direction; Monk intercepted the trigger signal and saved the governor's life. Rollins was arrested and Monk's name was cleared.
